discrepancies.impact: spline-GAM candidate not executed; candidate family incomplete
isotonic and beta calibration not executed
only one of four predeclared baselines used

discrepancies.frozen_v2_predeclared: NOT specified in the frozen V2 contract
discrepancies.impact: POST-HOC for V2 (added after seeing results); scientifically the correction itself is defensible but was not predeclared for V2
discrepancies.v2_1_remedy: predeclare the family-wise (Bonferroni) multiplicity rule IN the V2.1 contract before any V2.1 result
discrepancies.v2_executed: Bonferroni family-wise correction ADDED after the first result

discrepancies.frozen_v2_predeclared: ablation row policy referenced common-eligible rows
discrepancies.impact: primary analysis mixed eligible + ineligible (imputed) rows
discrepancies.v2_1_remedy: primary promotion analysis on core_model_feature_eligible==true; secondary robustness analysis on all rows with train-fold-only imputation + missingness indicators; report coverage + rejection reasons for both
discrepancies.v2_executed: evaluator used ALL matrix rows; core_model_feature_eligible not enforced for the primary promotion analysis

discrepancies.frozen_v2_predeclared: prior-completed-fold out-of-fold calibration on raw predictions
discrepancies.impact: calibrator trained on already-calibrated inputs (contamination of the OOF pool)
discrepancies.v2_1_remedy: retain an IMMUTABLE prior-fold RAW OOF pool (raw predictions + labels + dates); fit sigmoid/isotonic/beta ONLY on prior-fold RAW predictions; never fit a calibrator on already-calibrated predictions
discrepancies.v2_executed: the temporal calibrator stored the CALIBRATED prediction back into the prior-fold pool, so later folds' calibrators trained on a MIXTURE of raw and already-calibrated probabilities

discrepancies.impact: postgame actual starter is NOT automatically the starter known at the live prediction cutoff; potential training-serving skew
discrepancies.v2_1_remedy: quantify cutoff-known probable-starter vs actual (available+matches / available+differs / unavailable / revised-after-cutoff); do not claim parity until resolved via restrict-to-confirmed OR rebuild-with-cutoff-known OR explicit starter-uncertainty modelling
discrepancies.v2_executed: historical pitcher artifact uses POSTGAME actual-starter attribution

discrepancies.impact: day/night classification + tz-shift can be off by up to 1h during DST periods; not effective-dated
discrepancies.v2_1_remedy: effective-dated IANA time zones with a pinned tzdata dependency; rebuild + prove deterministic equality
discrepancies.v2_executed: schedule/travel local-time features use FIXED standard UTC offsets without historical DST

note: NRFI_CORE_V2 result is PROVISIONAL: the implementation did not fully match the frozen V2 contract. All V2 artifacts under docs/nrfi_core_v2/ are preserved unchanged; NRFI_CORE_V2_1 re-specifies and re-runs the program.
